research_question: What is the comparative effectiveness and safety of common therapies (D-penicillamine, zinc, trientine, tetrathiomolybdate) for Wilson disease?

population.name: Population
include: patients with Wilson disease (any age, any stage)
exclude: patients with other copper metabolism disorders

intervention.name: Intervention
include: zinc salts (zinc sulfate, zinc acetate, zinc gluconate)

comparison.name: Comparison
include: any other active Wilson disease treatment

outcome.name: Outcome
include: treatment discontinuation due to adverse events
